tool_args.label: NOVEMBER TIMETABLE & FALL TRACKWORK PROGRAMS

payload.title: NOVEMBER TIMETABLE & FALL TRACKWORK PROGRAMS
payload.description: Staff summary to the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to adjust schedules beginning November 10, 2025, through March 22, 2026, supporting track work programs and state of good repair projects.

payload.project_name: ADA Station Rehabilitation at Babylon, Hollis and Forest Hills Stations
payload.description: ADA station rehabilitation work at Babylon, Hollis and Forest Hills Stations, including tunnel construction at Hollis Station

tool_args.label: Atlantic Branch Tunnel Lighting
Hollis ADA Station Rehabilitation - Tunnel Construction

payload.project_name: Hollis ADA Station Rehabilitation - Tunnel Construction
payload.description: Tunnel construction at Hollis Station as part of the ADA station rehabilitation. Weekends of November 1-2 and November 15-16, eastbound local track between Jamaica and Queens Village out of service for 48 hours.

tool_args.label: Divide Interlocking Signal Cutover

payload.description: Signal cutover at Divide Interlocking near Hicksville. Weekend of November 8-9, all tracks in vicinity of Hicksville Station out of service for approximately 48 hours. Upgrades will allow additional switches to be installed in the future providing greater operational flexibility through Hicksville station.

tool_args.label: Montauk Branch Track Maintenance

payload.description: Track maintenance between Speonk and Montauk on November 16. Single main track out of service for approximately 30 hours. Includes grade crossing work at Jaggers Path, Old Country Rd, Napeague Meadow Rd, and drainage/surfacing at multiple locations.

tool_args.label: November 10 Timetable - Additional Ronkonkoma Train

payload.description: An additional pre-PM peak train will operate daily from Penn Station to Ronkonkoma. Beginning November 10, departing Penn Station at 3:20pm, making stops at Jamaica, Hicksville, Bethpage, Farmingdale, Wyandanch, Deer Park, Brentwood, Central Islip and Ronkonkoma.

tool_args.label: November 10 Timetable Change

payload.description: LIRR adjusts schedules beginning November 10, 2025 through March 22, 2026.

tool_args.label: Hollis Tunnel Construction Weekend 1

payload.description: Weekend tunnel construction at Hollis Station. Eastbound local track between Jamaica and Queens Village out of service for 48 hours.

tool_args.label: Divide Interlocking Signal Cutover Weekend

payload.description: Signal cutover at Divide Interlocking. All tracks near Hicksville Station out of service for approximately 48 hours.

tool_args.label: Hollis Tunnel Construction Weekend 2

payload.description: Weekend tunnel construction at Hollis Station. Eastbound local track between Jamaica and Queens Village out of service for 48 hours.

tool_args.label: Montauk Branch Track Maintenance

payload.description: Single main track between Speonk and Montauk out of service for approximately 30 hours for track maintenance.

tool_args.label: Timetable Period End

payload.description: End of adjusted schedule period beginning November 10, 2025.

tool_args.label: Funding for projects in LIRR Operating and MTA Capital Program budgets

payload.claim_text: Funding for these projects is contained in the Long Island Rail Road Operating and MTA Capital Program budget.
payload.subject: Funding for track work programs
payload.description: Funding source for projects mentioned in the document

tool_args.label: Divide signal upgrades enable future switches for operational flexibility

payload.claim_text: The upgrades to the signal system in Divide is a necessary step which will allow for additional switches to be installed in the future providing greater operational flexibility through Hicksville station.
payload.subject: Divide Interlocking signal upgrades
payload.description: Purpose of signal upgrades at Divide Interlocking

tool_args.label: NYCT/MTA bus cross-honoring LIRR fares at Hollis and Queens Village

payload.claim_text: Customers travelling to/from Hollis and Queens Village Stations will be accommodated by NYCT/MTA bus, who will cross honor LIRR fares.
payload.subject: Bus cross-honoring during Hollis tunnel construction

tool_args.label: NICE bus cross-honoring LIRR fares at Carle Place and Westbury

payload.claim_text: NICE bus will cross honor LIRR customers travelling to/from Carle Place and Westbury Stations.
payload.subject: Bus cross-honoring during Divide signal cutover

tool_args.label: Bus service to replace LIRR between Speonk and Montauk

payload.claim_text: With the single main track out of service between Speonk and Montauk, bus service will replace train service in both directions for a period of approximately 30 hours.
payload.subject: Bus replacement during Montauk branch maintenance

tool_args.label: Jaggers Path Grade Crossing: Timber and Crossing Tie Replacement & Surface TC82 Defect

payload.description: Timber and crossing tie replacement and surface TC82 defect repair as part of Montauk Branch track maintenance.

payload.description: Concrete mod replacement as part of Montauk Branch track maintenance.

payload.description: Thermite 6 joint elimination and surfacing as part of Montauk Branch track maintenance.

payload.description: Drainage and surfacing work at multiple locations as part of Montauk Branch track maintenance.
